source_pr.title: *: Update bootstrap and support pause user DDL when upgrading TiDB
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/43665

Problem Summary:
**New version TiDB:**
* set upgrade state and notify all TiDBs 
* wait the owner get the upgrade state
* pause all user DDLs
* _bootstrap(original logic)_
* resume all user DDLs
* set normal state and notify all TiDBs 

**Owner TiDB:**
* If cluster state is upgrading state, pause the user DDL job.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: ddl: make data race happy | sql := "select job_meta, processing from mysql.tidb_ddl_job where job_id in (select min(job_id) from mysql.tidb_ddl_job group by schema_ids, table_ids, processing) order by processing desc, job_id" (session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: make data race happy | sql := "select job_meta, processing from mysql.tidb_ddl_job where job_id in (select min(job_id) from mysql.tidb_ddl_job group by schema_ids, table_ids, processing) order by processing desc, jo….
